utility_evaluation.REASONING:

Since the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs', even if none are currently in place, this is still fully addressed because it explicitly states the status and cost.
5. total_budget: Present with both monthly and annual costs — fully specified.

All 5 items are present and fully specified according to the required format.
